name: @36095/nanashi
description: A lightweight utility package used in some of my projects.
author: Mario Plaza (36095) <me@mplaza.cl>

scripts.release: npm run release:bump && npm run release:publish-github
scripts.release:bump: bumpp package.json --commit "chore: bump version to v%s" --tag --all
scripts.release:publish-github: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const latestTag = execSync('git describe --tags --abbrev=0', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim(); console.log(`Creating GitHub release for tag: ${latestTag}`); execSync(`gh release create ${latestTag} --generate-notes`, { stdio: 'inherit' }); console.log(`GitHub release created for ${latestTag}`);"
